{{Quote|Retreat's not an option. We'll burn the Empire off Corellia like a sand tick from a bantha—or die trying.|Volos|<ref name="Star Wars: The Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
Found on most planets with hot and dry conditions, '''sand ticks''' were creatures that fed on larger animals' fluids. As big as a [[Human/Legends|Human's]] fist, the pests were usually found on [[Bantha/Legends|banthas]], but were repelled by reptilian creatures like the [[Dewback/Legends|dewback]].

{{Creature-stub}}
